headlines.headline: Grevon Biotech wins industry award for excellence in digital payments

sentiment.reasoning: Winning an industry award provides positive brand recognition but lacks direct financial impact on revenue or operations.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
